posts.author: beth1021 (Elisabeth Juliano)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great to see more details about the actions in workflows along with any error information.

What are you trying to achieve

Right now, I have workflows that occasionally have errors, but are mostly successful. I can only see where the error occurred, but have no way of knowing why it happened while the other runs were successful. Not knowing any details makes it difficult for me to know if there’s something I can do to fix it or if it was an internal server issue.
